star_1.text: The game is super fun, but I have a real big issue with it. If you play with Wi-Fi you are bombarded by so much ads you can't even play the game, but if you're offline the game "glitches" and "doesn't work". It also tries to make you watch a video to pass every level that you "fail" without giving an option to play again, and the coins on the coin level are placed in the worst places. Edit: It also won't stop vibrating even if you turn it off, it's not just a small thing either it's constant.

I just reinstalled this today. I thought, wow I used to like this game a lot! I should try it out again! But no. I start the game-On the 1st level- and I start out in 1st place and some how, woah, poof! I suddenly can't jump! This game is laggy, you can't jump,-Like I said before- and is pretty much impossible to play! If you're in 1st, it says you'll get eliminated so then you die. I don't understand how this was rated 4.2 out of everyone's reviews i've seen. another thing, too, many, ads! 😡😡
So many Ads cant enjoy the game. Fun Run has this beat 1mil times over. Its giving greedy game developers.
The game is glitching. When I try to do a level it starts and instantly finishes without me playing. Then after that, it doesn't want to play any further.
WARNING!!!!!do not download unless you absolutely love watching adds.

There is a big problem in this game that was,I spend the fee to challenge in this game that I had won the game but,i didn't get the reward so,nearly I lose 6100coins that I had lost .so ,for this issue now I deleting this game you must fix the issue.later I will return to this game .ok now good bye operators 👏🏻

I HATED it!!! I had the game literally less than a minute and I hated it!! heres why: there were NO directions at the beginning of the game, so I did NOT know how to jump AND I kept getting eliminated!!! I will try to play this game once you fix these problems. Otherwise I am not going to play it! Also the controls are super challenging and annoying!!!😡😡😡😡😡 PLEASE FIX!!! If you do fix I will give 5 stars: but for right now it's going to be a 1 star rating!
in stuck at level 44 . This game won't let me play and continue, every time press play I automatically die.
The adds are very boring and they interfere with ones progress unless the WiFi is off. One 🌟.

Crashed my device--the on-screen keyboard wouldn't pop up until I tapped the box to enter the player name a few times, and even then it immediately booted me into a race without letting me change my name. Then, in the race itself, I was unable to jump...and the on-screen keyboard popped up again.

starts out good and is a fun game, however, after getting to the higher levels, the physics are clearly flawed. Some jumps are limited in length at the worst times causing an incorrect race loss. Also, don't make users watch a video when they are just trying to exit the game.

I honestly just think this is a terrible game. This level was so hard I just had to give up on the game itself. One, the dances at the end if you win are so cringey they make me want to just puke. Also the skins look like there was no effort put into it. There are no faces, which make everything look like a Slenderman apocalypse. Apperently I have to win 4 times in a row. Ads are just EVERYWHERE. I'm installing thus game again when it's fixed.Wish I could give it 0 stars.

HIGHLY SUSPICIOUS APP The game is fine but the app uses a highly suspicious amount of memory, including when the app is closed. Additionally, when I use the device care tool to close it in the background it instantly reopens and begins using memory. In fact, it uses more memory while closed than any other app on my phone.

Every other second ad you want to play again how about an ad or waiting extra time you want to wait extra time? Ad anyway. Playing without wifi you have to reset almost every other game because the play again after the ad wont pop up so the no thanks wont pop up this would be fun if i could do anything without an ad being shoved in my face.

Game was fun but ads were really disruptive, so I decided to pay to not get ads. It was a lot better experience, until the devs decided that they will still need to show a ad banner at the bottom of the screen;you don't get ads that pop up at the end of each races for paying for no Ads, but just that banner is still and Ad. Refunded. Uninstalled.

I'm not even being a hater but this is the worst game of all times like seriously it doesn't respond immediately I know it isn't my phone the game is like sooooooooo slow I don't even know I sincerely just hate the game I played for two days hoping for a change but was a complete disappointment and am done with it. It even says "run fast be the best" above but it can't even let you jump at the same rate as others and when I double tap and then tap again it just makes me look the other way😤

The graphics, and gameplay are sucks. This is the first game that i had to delete in less an hour after i install it. If you improved started from the gameplay (maybe, add some ability to make your enemy left behind further, or getting player faster), at least, i just need to think twice to reinstall

I love this game more than myself.i gave it 1 star because its a very very very easy game which we can finish at once and run race 3D should be improved.i also play fun race 3D but both of them are very verryy verry eaasyyy peasyyyy. I also play so many other games like this. I love the games tooo much. But people say that after 23 tries they go to level 2. When I play I can finish first level at once only. Why do Others go to level 2 playing only once?

The game itself is really fun. Yes, there are a lot of ads. But my solution to this is playing with wifi off. $2.49 for no ads is ridiculous. My issue with this game is the controls, and it's the reason I'm uninstalling. It's tap once to jump, and again to double jump. But the problem is half the time, double jumping DOESN'T WORK. This causes me to lose the level and makes this game unfortunately unplayable.

Every single screen change has a 5s - 15s advertisement between them which is already very infuriating, but the worst thing gotta be how the game is lying to you. It leads you to believe you're playing against other players but that's not true. If you like the levels consider playing it offline to escape the ads because this is a single player experience. 1/5

star_2.text: Would be a fun game if not for the CONSTANT ads. Even after you just chose to watch the full ad for the bonus reward, it still forces another on you. Greddy. Shame in you devs
it's exactly like I remember playing with my siblings years ago,the graphics and everything but the glitch is reeeally bad
Its alright not great. Its either too hard or too easy. Keeps crashing and stole all my prizemoney. Has a strange glitch where my phone vibrates for a second over and over and have to restart app

I've had this game for a long time, at start seemed to be excellent, but as I leveled up, I noticed same levels are being repeated constantly. And as we progress, the movement I would expect from the character is not being made. For example, I am tapping constantly and after 3 tries it would work,as if the game doesn't want us to win. The same movement seems to be working for other contestants which are obviously seeming to be bots.. Overall good idea, tho improvement needed.
to many ads. 1 race and then another add.....I deleted the game

This is a very good game, but sometimes my character doesn't do anytime even if I tap a few million times, and so I lose the game. Very sorry but this problem is driving me nuts so I am uninstalling. Also this isn't the first time it's happened. So whoever wants to install this, pls think twice. This is not the only problem. Whenever I jump across the water/sand,the game pulls me back, but the other characters seem to be able to do it just fine. Pls fix. It is other wise an excellent game 👍👍👍

The game is entertaining but after a few courses, the game just starts rehashing the same ones over and over, so if you play it a few times, you'll find yourself knowing all the courses already. However, the reason for my 2-star rating is that I got the "paid" version and even then I still get ads on some occasions which is annoying and unacceptable. If you pay for it, you should get no ads at all.
fun game, but glitches out at level 44 so no more progress is possible. also not a fan of the new outfit merge system
cool game. I understand ads but after every race starting after the very first race. not cool

Very fun game, however I am unsure of whether or not I am playing against other real live players... I turned off my screen in the middle of a race and came back 3 minutes later to realize I was still in the middle of a race without losing my position, which wouldn't be possible in a real live race. Furthermore, the "in-app purchase" button to remove adds does not actually work.

The game concept is fun, but the controls are finicky. Quite often, it does not respond to input. Also, very often, I will watch an ad to get a reward, only to not receive that reward. It genuinely could be one of the better games if they worked out the bugs.

This game is fake, you can't even play with REAL people! Plus it doesn't even give you a tutorial how to play this game the devoloper really thinks that we will get good at this game in 5 seconds. The graphics are horrible compared to the ads and I lag everytime! ( My wifi is good) I suggest you not to download this horrible game, the reason why I gave this 2 stars because it's a running game and etc. I suggest you not to get this HORRIBLE game, it's a waste of time!

The game will randomly make you go backwards with no way to fix it and you will lose. And it doesn't always let uou double jump even if you need to. Also if another person jumps at the same ti.e as you then you will still be behind them. There's an ad that pops up that says click this if you want a speed boost. You watch an ad and then you are slower than before. And there's no way to turn off vibrations.

On second thought this game is not so good, I think that this game is specially made to make you loose when you get to level 35 because they are almost impossible. Because i cant jump up to the objects im meant to and the robots your going against can not giving you the chance to win, Infuriating game I wouldn't recommend. (Not so fun of a race) Edit: this is mainly a time waster so i will keep the game on a bare minimum

Alright, when I first saw this game, it looked incredibly fun. But when I started playing it, it was horrible. Why, you ask? Two reasons are because; One, the players do not look like they are real, because they seem to beat me in every level. In my opinion, I think they're bots. Lastly, two, it's either the game glitches, or the player I'm playing as goes a different direction randomly. I don't suggest playing this game. That's why I give this two stars.

Yeah, it was fun at first. But if you accidentally jumped off a wall and your character started running the wrong direction, you were doomed to fail. Also, the unending ads were not pleasant. You would get one after every single race! I don't recommend this game.

This game is so much and offers cool customization options, but the ad frequency is absurd. I don't mind an occasional random ad, but when it happens between every level and overrides your decision to opt out of watching the ad, it is so frustrating and makes me hate the game. It's also such an ineffective way to market a product, so if I was paying this creator for ad spend, I'd pull immediately.

This game is strange. It is fun, but has its problems. For example your character can miss a jump and start going backwards with no way to turn them around. The weirdest part of this game is the other "players". You can play this game offline. When playing offline the characters still display user names. There were two characters with "suicide" in the name. Why in the hell would the devs do that? Freaky.

You would think after ALL THESE YEARS of being able to play the game, the ads would have calmed down. It's still the same old ads galore, & short little levels. I doubt they even look @ their own reviews anymore, which means all it is, is a money maker game for them & that's all it is! They haven't updated the levels of character choice in FOREVER & the glitches keep happening. U think SOMETHING ANYTHING would change, but it doesn't. READ UR REVIEWS PLEASE!

this game was fun until I got to level 6 because I realised that I was versing robots not actual people , so then I carried on playing and then when you get to around level 16 they stop giving you different obstacle courses and they just go over some of the same course you have already played earlier in the game. overall the game was okay , probably a waste of time I've played better. (also there were WAY too many un-skippable adverts and they were soo long too)

star_3.text: I really had fun playing this game, I played it nonstop for 2 days. The only two reasons that I rated it 3 stars was because of the overwhelming amount of ads. There was literally and ad after every race. The secound reason was because of the lack of variety in game play, I understand the main purpose of this game is to battle other characters but I feel like there could be more to the game than last man standing. Over all fun game but those 2 reasons caused to delete the game.

this game is overall pretty good, offline, fun, not too hard and not too easy. HOWEVER. There is a huge issue with tour 4 and it is very frustrating. when you load into the first part of the race, it says final lap already, and then once the race starts there's a 50/50 chance it will say you lost or won, then the second part of the tour it starts saying final lap again but you get to race, but the race never ends and you have to close the game and you just wasted 5k coins for nothing, fix it pls

The game is awesome when offline (bc u don't have to worry about ads after EVERY level). Just put it on 🛩️ ModE. 1. The devs don't respond to ANYONE'S comments. imo, that's being dismissive to the players that make this game run today! Bc If they did, they wld READ our ideas & improve the game🤷🏼‍♀️. BUT it has been the same concept for YEARS! Change? doubtful. In 1 or 2 of the dances in the demo it's kinda explicit, u just have to be observant (& u'll know what I mean). 🙄

It looks like a nice game. However, having an advert after every race is very annoying. Then, if you want extra prize money, there is another advert. I can understand having an advert for the extra prize, but not another advert for just completing the race.
It has useless ads, but they are avoidable. If instead of useless ads, you were ASKING: 1000 coins, a skin, a dance or skip? You would have more ad views.

The game is fun with lots of potential. But for a game that has no music or sounds whatsoever (which is either lazy or weird at best), the damn ads blast with considerable volume after you lose - EVEN if you pay to have the "other" ads removed. Remove them ALL if someone pays. Or at the very least, offer two levels of ad removal where one includes all and one is just basic. It's VERY jarring when this dead silent game suddenly blasts a dumb angry birds ad because I lost the race.

I really love this game, it's amazing. I love the concept of how it goes. But I think you need some a bit Improvements if I wanna give you a five stars. The ads are typically annoying me and might let me lose all the time. Also I don't know if this game is online but.. The Bots/Players are soo difficult to come through, I don't know why but when I play in Level 6, I keep getting 4th/3rd. So please, Make the bots/players a bot easier. Also, I dont have a tutorial, so I don't know how to play it.

This game is awesome except that there are many adds for everything! I mean like who would want that and I tap a dozen times but my character doesn't move at all! Otherwise this game is awesome, cause it comes with different types of characters and there are tournaments that you can keep playing and come up with tricks that help you win. I really like the game and rate it 3 stars,you know you could check out this game. There is always an advantage and a disadvantage for everything😉🤩☺.

Starts out as a really fun game and time consuming but then I had some problems 1) The ads. I get for like money and stuff but too many. 2) The bugs. I started and the game was great but then every time I would try to play a match it would glitch and say it was over and it gives me the option to pass the level for an ad but I would click it and it wouldn't work. It didn't give me any other options. Just needs a little help overall a great game!

To may ads! I get eliminated one time, one time.. and guess what there is a 30 second add. It hapens constantly... there is not end. I suggest you do not down load the app It is a great game, but also the graphics are ehhh... it would glitch sometimes, and have minor problems, but I still think if it improves with less ads and acceptable graphics It would be an awesome game, for now three stars

It's a REALLY fun game, so it's a disappointment when it has ads. My PLAY AGAIN button won't work, so I can't get off level sixteen either! I also want to know if like, someone could, like make the game better by getting to choose, who you verse, or make it random. But it's ok. It's good enough to buy. Seriously. In a year, this game'll probably be five bucks! And, is it true you can only play FAKE people?😥🤐😮 And also, it UNINSTALLS itself!!!!!!

Fun, but could be SO much better. this game does have an addictive nature to it, and the gameplay is mostly polished, but the devil is in the details. Sooooo much is missing from a really great game. Time records, More diversity in courses, or ANYTHING to play for other than coins that don't buy much... I would suggest the game makers study HillClimb Racing 2.... This is a great concept of a game that isn't there yet.

Overall its a good addictive game. What i dont like is the fact it skips too much. At first i thought it was my phone but then i got a new one and it still did it. It cost me a few games. Also there were several times playing this game when the count down ended and i automatically lost. I know it was some kind of glitch but it happens too often. If those things were fixed i would give 5 stars all day everyday.

something feels very fishy about this game. i don't think I'm actually playing against real people. ever other player followed the same movements and there's no randomness like they're would be if 4 humans were playing. plus it always finds a have instantly. Any other game on Earth takes at least a few seconds to search for players before starting. i like the idea of the game but these things bug me because the game feels very stale and easy.

Sort of entertaining has some kinks First thing they need to fix is ads. Everytime I win a game I get a ad. If I lose one I get a ad. Another thing is the other contestants they are robots they always make you win first place. It would be nice to play with real people or even have a fair game. The last thing I have to say is that there should be more varieties of avatars for your character. I HOPE THIS HELPS YOU WITH CHOOSING WHETHER OR NOT TO GET THE APP!

At first, I like the graphics and everything. So challenging and it makes me more competitive in a way that you have your opponents like they are someone who controlled them. However, when I reach level 20, my character cannot jump as higher like it cannot reach those higher blocks.

i like that there are finally new levels! they are really cool! I am not sure if it was because the game itself was updated, or I just made it far enough. also, why is there no sound? this game would be so muchbetter if I could hear something. it gets kind of boring after a few minutes at a time of playingbecause its silent. umless, I just dont know how to turn on music. Cool game but could use a few updates!

I really liked all of this game except for the fact that after level 50 the same races come over and over agsin and it is really boring and i also hate the fact that if you fail a race on the second time you have to do it all over again or you have to pay money .And my device wont let me give money so i have to keep playing the race a million times.but other than hat everything elese is fine.

the game is alright, some annoying factors like not being able to turn around right away but honestly the most disappointing thing about the game is that you are always playing bots.. I dont understand why they couldn't actually put people against other people its extremely lazy in my opinion and makes the game much less fun. You can tell if you close the game mid race and reopen it a little later you and all the other bots are in the same spot. It's very lame and upsetting.

The game itself is pretty good, however, the ads are really bad. You regularly get video ads, some for 30 seconds, and theres usually a banner ad. That also causes my game to lag on some levels. The game also looks like it's a multiplayer game, but I'm pretty sure its just singleplayer. Not exactly a positive or negative, but i think the game could be massively improved with an in-depth multiplayer system

star_4.text: This is a fun and easy game (not sure why some comments talk about no tutorial...you just tap to jump. You need a tutorial?). The only reason I didn't give 5 stars is that after you have to master 15 or 20 races (winning 3 races before you move on) you just run the same races over and over with no new routes. Please add more, harder and longer levels and I'll come back.

I like the game, but once I reached level 35 the obstacle course kept changing every time I lost. it would for some reason revert back to the first couple of level obstacle courses. Also lets say I completed one of the 3 runs on level 35, the second run would be a completely different course and so would the 3rd run. I've never had problems with the glitches on jumping. BUT my player would randomly run the opposite direction. Or when I go down a ramp, he would seem to get stuck and slide slow.

This game is really fun... but the levels repeat and that's the real deal breaker for me. But the levels are very challenging and there not that hard if you like the fact that you don't get to pick the levels but other then that the game is pretty fun and challengeing! There isn't any ads but some of the ads.. the game is fun.. and I download it!!! So over all the game is super fun!!!!!! Thanks for listening hope this message helps you decide to download it or not! I would definitely download it
This game is so fun to play but there's a problem in the game just now when I played I was in the first rank but they showed that race again.
Game's awesome, I have to say, It's mesmerizing and entertaining, just more content please (Maps, skins, tours, basically everything you have)

i love this game! a good thing to play when your bored! i wish the ads were not as much but otherwise good! one more thing... you unlock new places to run but i wish we wouldnt have to run the same place every time we want to unlock a new level! A leaderboard would be good as well, because it gets a bit boring after a while. I reccormend it for something to play if you are bored.

I have played this game on my ipad a couple years ago, and it was one of the funnest games I had ever played. But now I instaill it after a couple years on my ph, and it is still very fun and competitive and ai love the unique maps. But there is just so many ads. And every time you pass a level ad time. Every time you click No thank you to something or yes, ad time. And there for so long, and you dont even have a choice to skip them!! Not even after 3 seconds or 5 you have to wath the whole ad!
it is really fun and I love parkour.

This game is really fun and has a lot of levels, races and championships. It's great to platy offline too. The reason I only rated 4 stars is because it sometimes glitches, which causes me to loose, and the characters are a bit messy, I think they could be a bit more creative, or add new skins, eg. animals. I still reccomend it though.

This is an awesome game that challenges you to complete courses while still beating your fellow competetors. I highly recomend this game. Its fun, challenging, and gives you some great self-esteem. I even found myself getting so determined to beat other players and earn more coins. PLAY, AND DOWNLOAD RUN RACE 3D!!! (If I love it, I think you will too!)

This is very good game, it has a bit of ads but if you turn off your WiFi or mobile data, the ads will not pop up. But it has one problem, when I get defeated by the players, it shows something that tells you to resume the game AND there is 'no thanks' option ! That's why I have to restart the game. Pls fix this problem and I'll give 5 star rating. 🌟

I like the game, but some levels are close to IMPOSSIBLE to complete, like level 36. I had tried close to 15 times and I still haven't passed it yet! I recommend maybe putting an option to create your own obstacle course, I personally think that I would enjoy creating it and racing it with other players. But other than that I LOVE this game.

This game is AMAZING. It is really fun to play and I will spend a long time play ing it. The only problem is that you have to watch and add to be able to open up a chest. I find that you should be able to get keys to open up chests in game I would really like if you could do that. And also I think you should make the levels a little more hard because I win like all most every time. Thx!

I dont normally play games, but I seen this advertised on insta, and it's a great game game. simple but fun. would be even better if there was a online multiplayer mode so you can race your friends or a online tournament mode. also would be great if the customisation was better, and you had more control over the customisation. maybe even add some powers. for example if you jump on that box you get super speed for 10 seconds or something. insta: 365Recordings

Run Race 3D is a very fun game. It would have five stars if it didn't have these two problems. First of all, my character will randomly start running backwards and will not stop. My second issue is that I spent $3.00 to remove ads, yet I still get ads like regular. I would like my money back, or to actually remove the ads. Anyway, the game is fun and challenging. 4/5 stars from me.

I like this game it's just that it's hard to control when im going up a rope or if i hit a corner i go the other way, But ima be nice and give it four stars. If you have the same issue try downlouding Funrace 3 its kinda the same thing but you have more control and i think it takes less data. But yall STOP SPELLING WORST WRONG IT DRIVES MAH CRAZY!!!

I like the game overall. However, if I pay you for "no ads", I fully expect NO ADDS! once paid you, yet I continue to get ads and they're super annoying. Plus, you took my money under false pretenses. Also, sometimes when you end up the wrong direction, you only are allowed to go back a tiny distance while other times you nearly do half the course before it turns you around.

I gave it four stars because after every match it gives an ad which really irritating. ....if that is fixed it will all be good......other than that it is an excellent game, very interesting and challenging levels..... I would recommend it...it is a little difficult but you'll get the hang of it.. Sometimes we can't jump right.... But overall I recommend it!

Honestly? My biggest complaint is level 18. No matter how fast I can jump, I keep hitting my head while trying to climb the wall on the right. Which REALLY sucks because it makes me lose when the others know exactly when to jump. It makes it painfully obvious you're playing against bots. That being said, is it possible to have a mode where you play against actual people? Thanks!

Game looks cool.. At level 35, playing it while waiting for the lift, listening songs. This game is for a different breed, not many will show interest to try it out, mechanism is simple.. Little bugs I found with crown that the person leading get and when the character tries to go back to some other world when we hit the wall ( I came across to this many time I have to wait for the person to come back from that zone and go along with the race.. Try it out

star_5.text: I love the graphics, its a great game to play because of the racing. The controls are very simple, not complicated and it gives a lot of adds to show more fun games to tru out to help. I personally don't have a single problem with this game. If i were you, id try it out and see myself if i were to like it. People cant be mean to you in the game, and theres no chat. Idk if you play online or whatever, but you can customize your name. You can unlock new levels. Try out this amazing game!

The game is very fun & addictive. In the time I've played, I've experienced no bugs. Also, a lot of people complain about ads or their characters running backwards but the game is free so they have to make money somehow & the running backwards is too help you reset and make the obstacle/jump you missed. My only complaint is I wish there was a multiplayer mode. Otherwise, great game!

I mean I like it but it could be so much better. The characters look like the ones from Gang Beasts or Human Fall Flat. could be more "Characterized or designed" instead of looking like cut and paste ragdolls. The fact that it's a one touch game is interesting but so far I've played 4 games and came in 1st every time. I'll keep playing this game till I get tired of it but I would reccomend making this game more skill based by using two touch controls - moving and jumping instead of just jumping.

Run Race is awesome!! I get so competitive running up against the other players 😂 even when I fall short I play the same level over and over until I win lol. I also like how there's no sound in game so I can play the music on my phone at the same time, with my tunes in the background I can literally play for hours!! Also I dig the costumes and dances at the end of each race, they are well worth the time to unlock!

I Love the game BUT. . . . . .It could of been SO much better. Feels like someone spent very little time on the game because its limited in the number of game courses (feels like 5-7) that just repeat themselves over and over again. You get coins and I love the prize coin vault runs BUT. . . that store is SO limited with few stuff. i suggest getting upgrades on skills too. Please make a better game rebounding off of this one.

I LOVE this game. This probably looks like a paid review, but trust me, it isn't. I know a few reviews claim that there are issues with double jumping? I haven't had any. Although, after a reach a certain level, it starts mixing up the levels. I dunno if that's a glitch or if that was on purpose. Overall, awesome game. Would definitely reccomend!
how i like is how I have to race 🏁 with people in different states . I feel so comfortable racing with other people I feeèeeeeel so comfortable. playing with game.
hi I personally love this game I have been playing stickman games ever since I was 5 and this one is on the top of my list. I loooooooooooove everything about it. thanks 😊

I really like this game, definitely a time killer! And it's also offline, which is a bonus. One thing that bothers me are the ads that keeps showing up. But, I can deal with that problem easily, just turn off Wi-Fi or mobile data and turn on airplane mode! Nice game, keep it up, and please remove the ads! It's so annoying, it's ruining a pleasant gaming experience.

game has no sound. too many ads. i understand it's a free game but that's just too much, either you win/lose, a 15-30 seconds ad will play (if the wifi is on). randomized the same lower level maps on level 30+ over and over again. costumes and body built has no effect on speed/attributes. bug/glitch- when you miscalculated a jump and hit an object, you will go back a mile! it will be awesome if we can play with friends, maybe a multiplayer online. Game was fun that's why I'm giving a 5. thanks.

Honestly, the top critical review must have been written by someone with issues about the game developers. The game is literally so easy to play if you don't pick it up after 1 or 2 races there is, gaming is not for you. The instructions are clear enough for an untrained monkey to follow and the graphics are exactly the same as the ad. Ads could be tuned down a bit, but no real difference from other games. Easy fun gameplay, longevity might be an issue due to how simple it is.

It's a good game and addictive. Please include this options probably in next update; pause option where we can pause the game, replay option even if it's only for last lap and probably eyes and mouth on character, felt like i will connect more with my flash character if i see a facial expressions. i really love the challenges in this game. it's entertaining!
I am facing an glitch but still 5 stars cause its fun and the glitch is i join a game but I lose the game didn't even start i still lost
i've been playing this game ever since I was little and playing it again feels just as fun and authentic as it did 6 years ago. don't ever change this masterpiece of a game

Very good game, if u want no adds, turn off ur wifi and save up cuz on the day before halloween, there are 1000 coins skins, there are 6, and there gone November 1. There are also Christmas skins that are also limited, so start saving! Me and my friend have lots of fun on this game. I recommend it to everyone!!!

I really like this game. I have played till 900. Every levels are repeated but still I never get tired of this game. Run Race 3d is the best game. I just want new levels. I want to continue this game from level 900 if you make new levels. Please make new levels. I am really loving this game. You must be rewarded an Oscar for making games. And it is not just me asking for it, it is everyone asking for new levels. I have enough complaints but still gave you 5 stars. Yours sincerely, Darshini Sheth

"Hard and challenging but fun and a great way to teach people to never give up. Brace yourself for some mess ups, winning, obsticles, heart exceleration, and elimination! WARNING: You may get frustrated like I did. For the makers of this game, maybe you should add powerups. It's ok if you don't, just suggesting."

It was amazing!!!! I lovee it!!!!! I just had to figure out how to jump and how to rap and then hold to make the person jump higher but it was very fun figuring out how to play this game and when i got it i won every single game!!!! It is very easy!! Rely recomend it!!!!

I think this is a really fun game. There is no tutorial but it tells you how to play when you are loading into your first game! The graphics are really good and is cool because you can get different skins for your characters and you can change the size of them! It shows you quick adds that are related to the game so if you like this game you will probably like the one they show you! You should definitely try it out because people have different opinions and this is my opinion so try it out!

I really like the simplicity of the person/design. It's challenging enough to enjoy but easy to get the hang of so it doesn't get annoying. Easy enough to learn without a tutorial, just trial and error. Controls are good, it's fun to play but needs more new levels after level 25. To everyone complaining about the ads...haven't you realised yet? You can turn your Wi-Fi off for a while and play any game you like without ads. It's simple!! 🙄
